project.name: Spring Outdoor 2026 Reviewed Balanced Draft
project.description: Reviewed on April 16, 2026. Hard groups preserved, obvious fuzzy matches corrected, and obvious new players spaced as a soft preference.

I'm slow now. I'm older, I've gained weight, I don't do cardio anymore. I can sprint down the field once, but then I'm tired. I'm still in good shape I think, but keeping up with the other fast players is more challenging now. If you're still reading this after rolling your eyes at my self assessment, put me on a team with someone I know please and thank you.
